title: Advice For Entrepreneurs | #shorts
full_text: I'm here with my friend and business mentor Divya Gugnani. She taught me to be relentless, to throw myself at every opportunity. And I want to hear from you. Your best advice for female entrepreneurs. The number one piece of advice for female entrepreneurs is be adaptable. When you're building a business from the ground up and scaling it, the only thing that you can count on is change. The only constant is actually change. And you have to learn to navigate it. And you need to learn to embrace it and overcome it every step of the way. Be a little shameless, would you say? Ruthlessly shameless. Go for it, ladies. The world is your oyster. sees the day.
